name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Liver Chunks in Gravy 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully-balanced, liver protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Beef & Liver Adult Cat Canned Food , fully-balanced, beef & liver protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 7.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) -?81 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) -?1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -?180 IE/kg Iron -?8 mg/kg Copper -?1.2 mg/kg Iodine -?0.21 mg/kg Manganese -?1.6 mg/kg Zinc -?8.0 mg/kg Selenium -?0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (beef 4% min, liver 4% min), Cereals, Fish & Fish Derivatives, Minerals, Preservatives, Colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serves 2 meals. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
